name: query-module-structure
description: The query module follows a clean modular structure with submodules: ast/, backends/, validation/, registry.ts, and index.ts barrel. DDL should follow the same pattern as a sibling module at src/query/ddl/ or src/ddl/ as a top-level module.
relevantCode:
query/
  ast/ (types, parser, operators, serialization)
  backends/ (types, memory.ts, sql.ts)
  validation/ (types, validator.ts)
  registry.ts
  index.ts (barrel exports)
recommendation: Place DDL generator at src/ddl/ as a top-level module (parallel to query/, composition/) since it's not a query component but a schema transformation utility.
